creator: shaun@shamz.net
text:
building libiconv-1.9.2 port fails with checksum mismatch. Looks like someone forgot to update the checksum with the port.  Ports tree is up-to-date locally.

=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.no.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: libiconv-1.9.2.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from http://ftp.gnu.org/gnu/libiconv/.
fetch: libiconv-1.9.2.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.gnu.org/gnu/libiconv/.
fetch: libiconv-1.9.2.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.gtlib.cc.gatech.edu/pub/gnu/gnu/libiconv/.
fetch: libiconv-1.9.2.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from http://mirrors.usc.edu/pub/gnu/libiconv/.
fetch: libiconv-1.9.2.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from http://ftp.funet.fi/pub/gnu/prep/libiconv/.
fetch: libiconv-1.9.2.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.kddlabs.co.jp/GNU/libiconv/.

Fix: 

update the MD5 checksums for the port.
How-To-Repeat: try to build the port
